lastReleaseMessage: chore(htbh): add notify_property_list_changed to source-reference guard allowlist

barRaise.topFinding: Both HIGHs from 2026-06-22 closed: v0.98.10 landed (HEAD fd17866, project.godot 0.98.10) and the corrupt loose object d188556 is repaired (git fsck clean). Three versions of real work also shipped - v0.99.0 end screens plus v0.99.1/v0.99.2 moving the end screen, pause menu, and full HUD out of the world_3d.gd god-object into editor scenes, trimming world_3d.gd by 173 lines under an owned plan (docs/BEST_PRACTICES_PARITY.md). The one HIGH left is that all of v0.99.0-v0.99.2 is uncommitted: the GDD pill reads v0.99.2 while HEAD/project.godot read v0.98.10, the three new UI scene folders are untracked, and world_3d.gd sits dirty. Fresh (hours old, not a stall) but on a mount that corrupted a .git blob this week; one scripts/release.ps1 run closes it. Verdict up at-risk -> needs-attention.

actions.title: Run scripts/release.ps1 to commit + push v0.99.0-v0.99.2 so HEAD, project.godot, the GDD pill (v0.99.2), and the discord dedupe reconcile and the untracked UI scenes (source/ui/end_screen, game_hud, pause_menu) leave the no-git state. Closes version-pill-drift and FUSE-defense in the same pass.

Run the deferred defense-balance review the v0.98.10 changelog flagged: most buildings are now 2x2+, which grants +1 defense under the v0.34.0 rule (GDD:1650). Confirm the roster-wide buff is intended or re-derive the affected values.
Re-point the GDD tile-constant note (GDD:4816) off the retired enemy_base.gd / fog_of_war.gd / noise_heatmap.gd onto the live 3D-stack constants.

Capture and log a world_3d 1000-3000-enemy profiler run in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md (still 25 rows, no 3D-crowd baseline) before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; compounded by the footprint-density bump.
Refresh or retire docs/ARCHITECTURE.md off its v0.80.1 2D snapshot (now contradicted by BEST_PRACTICES_PARITY.md) and delete the orphaned source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid).

Re-run the dashboard writer after the commit and stage with the tracked casing (status/data/Hordes.json) so the card stops lagging (version 0.98.9 vs committed v0.98.10, workTreeClean stale); repoint or relabel the zero roster metrics.
